prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KIDSGUITAR-RED Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kids Musical Toys Interactive Electronic Guitar Lights and Sounds Red Description: This battery-operated Kidplokio electric guitar toy is ideal for your tiny future rockstar to start mastering their musical skills. It features 8 engaging electronic keys on the fretboard that can play a variety of sounds, tones, and rhythms across musical genres, plus 4 fun animal sounds.

Your little musician can switch between classic music genres like rock, disco, and samba with the easy to use buttons that play different sounds and rhythms. With flashing lights, cool sounds, and an adjustable guitar strap your little one can imagine they are rockin' out on the world's biggest stages right from your living room.

Introducing music into playtime with a kid's electric guitar is a great way to let your kid get creative while learning about music, singing, and maybe even songwriting. With a variety of modes, tones, and rhythms they can create endless sets and jams for their home audience while practicing.

Although this kid's electric guitar is a toy, it's a great way for little kids to develop their fine motor and hand-eye coordination skills while practicing music without the price of a real guitar. This toy guitar is also a great addition to any preschool playroom, church, or afterschool program.

The electronic battery-electric guitar toy uses 3 AA batteries and is suitable for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. Make sure to grab one for your little rockstar - it makes a great birthday or holiday gift. Search Terms: kids musical toys guitar for toddlers baby boys musical toys for girls electric pretend play light up music instrument learning development buttons interactive songs playing magic learn education teach Features: - INTERACTIVE KIDS GUITAR: This battery operated Kidplokio electric guitar toy is ideal for your tiny future rockstar to start mastering their musical skills! It features 8 engaging electronic keys on the fretboard that can play a variety of sounds, tones, and rhythms across musical genres, plus 4 fun animal sounds! - LIGHT UP MULTI-MUSICAL TOY: Your little musician can switch between classic music genres like rock, disco and samba with the easy to use buttons that play different sounds and rhythms. With flashing lights, cool sounds, and an adjustable guitar strap your little one can imagine they are rockin' out on the world's biggest stages right from your living room. - ENCOURAGE CREATIVITY THROUGH MUSIC: Introducing music into playtime with a kids electric guitar is a great way to let your kid get creative while learning about music, singing and maybe even songwriting! With a variety modes, tones, and rhythms they can create endless sets and jams for their home audience while practicing. - EDUCATIONAL TOY INSTRUMENT - Although this kids electric guitar is a toy, it's a great way for little kids to develop their fine motor and hand-eye coordination skills while practicing music without the price of a real guitar. This toy guitar is also a great addition to any preschool playroom, church or afterschool program. - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: High-quality ABS plastic; Colors: Red, blue or pink; Dimensions: 22.4" x 7.9" x 1.8"; Batteries required: (3) AA batteries (not included); Safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Red Kids Electric Guitar Toy with Lights
